title: Biomedical Device Technology Mission and Vision
content:
Biomedical Device Technology Mission and Vision

MISSION

To educate entrepreneurial, preferable biomedical device technicians with ethical values who have received the necessary theoretical and applied training in the fields needed by the industry and who can follow innovations related to their profession and adapt to changes, provide coordination between engineering and medical sciences.

VISION

Our vision is to be a leading program in the field; Effective, safe and healthy operation of the devices used in the diagnosis and treatment of diseases, necessary maintenance-repair, calibration, fault detection and repair in order to minimize harmful effects for patients and practitioners with the correct and appropriate installation, production, R&D, quality-control, necessary theoretical and practical courses as well as internship opportunities.
